name: Roland P-6
use: Sample pad performance, loop/granular/looper, dual FX bus routing, pattern sequencing, motion recording, sampling
overview: 6-pad looper/sampler with built-in mic, GRANULAR pad, 6-slot effect chain, and two independent FX buses (BUS A, BUS B, BUS EFFECT). Pads routed independently per bus. Pattern sequencer supports real-time and step input with motion recording (knob automation per step). 20 MFX types including DJFX Looper, Scatter, Isolator, Resonator, Vinyl Sim, Cassette Sim, Lo-Fi, Crusher, Compressor, and more. 4 banks × 16 patterns × 16 steps. 48 sample slots (8 banks × 6 pads).
workflow: Play a pattern: Press [COPY ►] to start/stop. Set tempo: turn [TEMPO/VALUE] (fine adjust: [SHIFT] + [TEMPO/VALUE] in 0.1 BPM steps, range 40.0–300.0)

Select pattern: Press [PATTERN] → hold [PATTERN] + top-4 step buttons to pick bank (1–4) → release [PATTERN] → press step button 1–16 for pattern number. To queue next pattern while playing: hold [PATTERN] + press step (switches at end of current pattern)
Mute a pad: [SHIFT] + sample pad [1–6] or [GRANULAR] while pattern is playing. Repeat to unmute. [SHIFT] + BANK button mutes entire bank
Bus routing: Dim glow = BUS A (dry) | Blinking dim = BUS B (dry) | Bright = BUS EFFECT (through MFX chain). Toggle: [MFX] + pad (A↔EFFECT) | [DELAY] + [MFX] + pad (B↔EFFECT)
Step input: Press pad to select it, then press step buttons to toggle steps on/off. Lit step = active. Press lit step again to remove it

Step edit (note/vel/prob/gate/substep): Long-press step button until it blinks → while holding, press [GRANULAR] to cycle through: note / velocity / probability / gate time / sub step → turn [TEMPO/VALUE] to change
Copy step / Paste step: Press [QUANTIZE] → VALUE to select source step → [KYBD] + [OCT+] → VALUE → 'COPY' → [ENTER]. Then VALUE to select dest → [KYBD] + [OCT+] → 'PStE' → [ENTER]
Duplicate all steps (double length): Press [QUANTIZE] → [KYBD] + [OCT+] → VALUE → 'DUPL' → [ENTER]. All steps are copied after last step

Copy/paste pattern: [SHIFT] + [COPY] → VALUE → 'Ptn' → [ENTER] → VALUE to select dest → [ENTER]. Copy a pad's sequence: VALUE → 'PArt' → [ENTER] → select dest pattern → [SHIFT] + [COPY] → select dest pad → [ENTER]
Pattern length: [SHIFT] + [D' LAST] → turn [TEMPO/VALUE] → [EXIT]. Shuffle: [SHIFT] + [D SHUFFLE] → VALUE (-90–90; 10–16 = pleasant groove) → [EXIT]
Real-time record: [QUANTIZE] → [COPY ►]; turn PITCH/START/END/LEVEL knobs to record motion automation. Delete step motion: Press [QUANTIZE] → VALUE to select step → [SHIFT] + [OCT- MOTION] → [ENTER]
Route pad to bus: [MFX] + pad (A↔EFFECT) | [DELAY]+[MFX]+pad (B↔EFFECT). MFX effect select: hold [MFX] + step buttons. Use CTRL1/2/3 to tweak parameters

Sampling: Press [SAMPLING] → press blinking pad → press [SAMPLING] to start → press [SAMPLING] to stop & save. Level: watch step-button VU meter, aim for C–TIE buttons (-3 to 0 dB) occasionally lighting. Rate: [LO-Fi] cycles 44.1k→22.0k→14.7k→11.0k
Step sampling (equal slices): In sampling mode: [SHIFT] + [PITCH] → S.2–S.64 slices. Then sample repeatedly — unit auto-assigns note numbers starting at C4 per slice
Save (WRITE): [SHIFT] + [TIE WRITE] → VALUE → ALL / PAd / Pd.AL / Ptn / Pt.AL / EFCt → [ENTER]. Restore: MENU (SHIFT+OCT+) → rL.Pt (pattern) / rL.Sq (sequence) / rL.Pd (pad) → [ENTER]
Non-charge USB mode: Hold [C EXIT] while powering on → battery-only mode (device won't charge from or draw power from connected iOS/USB device)

tips: BUS A / B = dry to outputs; BUS EFFECT = through the MFX chain. Dim glow = BUS A, blinking dim = BUS B, bright = BUS EFFECT
Motion recording: turn any knob (PITCH/START/END/LEVEL) during real-time or step record — automation per step, plays back with pattern
DJFX Looper SPEED negative = reverse playback; SPEED=0 = freeze/hold the current audio frame
Scatter: TYPE chooses the rearrangement pattern, DEPTH sets how scrambled. Use with pattern playback for instant glitch performance
Step master probability: KYBD + TEMPO/VALUE while in step edit. Adds to note probability — great for fill variation without programming fills
Polyphonic (POLY) mode: SHIFT + LOOP → all 6 pads play simultaneously from one press — instant chord or layer ★
Probability: P.1_2 means 'play 1 time then skip 1' — use P.1_4 on a fill step to fire it every 4 loops. P.1st = intro hit only. P.n1 = skip intro, always after
Sub steps: divide a step into 2–16 sub-divisions and choose which fire. Great for rolls, ghost notes, or triplet feels inside a 16th-note grid
Step sampling: SHIFT+PITCH in sampling mode → set S.2–S.64 slices. Each sampling press records one slice. After all slices done, keyboard buttons play them chromatically from C4
Sampling Lo-Fi tip: set [LO-Fi] to 11.0k (slow blink) before sampling for a lo-fi aesthetic baked into the sample — saved permanently at that quality
Queue next pattern: hold PATTERN + tap a step while pattern is playing — it waits until the current pattern finishes before switching. No audio glitch
Resample the P-6's own output: route pad to BUS EFFECT → enter sampling mode → set [END] = SynC → press SAMPLING (or ø) to start — captures the processed signal including MFX chain
Delete step motion selectively: SHIFT + OCT- (MOTION) clears only the knob automation of one step without removing the note trigger
Insert empty step (KYBD+OCT+ → InSt) shifts all subsequent steps forward — great for fixing off-by-one timing errors without re-entering everything

rows.desc: Voice env Decay / Sample start position
